title: Elderly man murdered in Harkerville
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News","html":"Breaking News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS – A 67-year-old man was brutally murdered on a farm at Harkerville, on the N2 between Plettenberg Bay and Knysna, at about 15:45 yesterday, 10 September.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS – A 67-year-old man was brutally murdered on a farm at Harkerville, on the N2 between Plettenberg Bay and Knysna, at about 15:45 yesterday, 10 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"His hands were tied and he had suffered multiple injuries to his body and head."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, the man's body was discovered after a Mercedes-Benz was found abandoned at Sedgefield earlier the day, leading to a search for the owner, which took security personnel to the victim's home.","html":"According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, the man's body was discovered after a Mercedes-Benz was found abandoned at Sedgefield earlier the day, leading to a search for the owner, which took security personnel to the victim's home."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Preliminary investigation led to the arrest of two suspects, aged 28 and 34. The suspects, a woman and a man, remain in police custody and will appear in court once charged.","html":"Preliminary investigation led to the arrest of two suspects, aged 28 and 34. The suspects, a woman and a man, remain in police custody and will appear in court once charged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spies said Plettenberg Bay police opened a murder docket and the suspects are facing charges of murder and theft of a motor vehicle.","html":"Spies said Plettenberg Bay police opened a murder docket and the suspects are facing charges of murder and theft of a motor vehicle."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
